/people-photos/pima-county/jennifer-alle.notes: Official Pima County supervisor portrait, 360x540. She is the current Board Chair (2025-).

/people-photos/pima-county/steve-christy.subject: Steve Christy
/people-photos/pima-county/steve-christy.attribution_required: Photo via Pima County, AZ official supervisor page

/people-photos/pima-county/andres-cano.j.subject: Andrés Cano
/people-photos/pima-county/andres-cano.j.attribution_required: None required (CC0). Optional courtesy: Manuel Ruiz Photography, via Wikimedia Commons.
/people-photos/pima-county/andres-cano.j.notes: High-resolution 6091x5189 headshot. Uploaded to Wikimedia in May 2024 by Azpolitics520 with photographer credit to Manuel Ruiz Photography. From his state legislator period but recent (2024) and clearly identifiable as Cano. CC0 means fully reusable.

/people-photos/pima-county/jan-lesher.jp.subject: Jan Lesher
/people-photos/pima-county/jan-lesher.jp.attribution_required: Photo via Pima County, AZ Administration page
/people-photos/pima-county/jan-lesher.jp.notes: Very high-res official portrait (3648x5472). Pima County Administrator since April 2022.

/people-photos/pima-county/theresa-culle.subject: Dr. Theresa Cullen
/people-photos/pima-county/theresa-culle.license: University of Arizona academic directory (fair-use editorial)
/people-photos/pima-county/theresa-culle.attribution_required: Photo via University of Arizona Mel and Enid Zuckerman College of Public Health directory
/people-photos/pima-county/theresa-culle.notes: 480x600 headshot from UA Public Health directory (uploaded Sept 2024). Could not find a pima.gov-hosted portrait for Cullen despite multiple searches; pima.gov press releases about her hire and retention don't carry her image. UA directory page is the cleanest official-adjacent source — she's a UA clinical associate professor.

/people-photos/regional/chris-nanos.jpg.subject: Chris Nanos
/people-photos/regional/chris-nanos.jpg.attribution_required: Photo via Pima County Sheriff's Department official website
/people-photos/regional/chris-nanos.jpg.notes: 250x300 official portrait in uniform from the Sheriff's Department site (file dated 2021). Small resolution but it's the canonical official portrait. Saved to regional/ per instructions (Sheriff is countywide elected position).

/people-photos/regional/laura-conover.pn.subject: Laura Conover
/people-photos/regional/laura-conover.pn.attribution_required: Photo via Pima County Attorney's Office leadership page
/people-photos/regional/laura-conover.pn.notes: 800x800 PNG official leadership portrait, uploaded January 2024. PCAO server had SSL chain issues with default WebFetch; downloaded via curl with -sk. Saved to regional/ since County Attorney is a countywide elected position.

/people-photos/regional/gabriella-cazare.subject: Gabriella Cázares-Kelly
/people-photos/regional/gabriella-cazare.license: University of Arizona academic directory (fair-use editorial)
/people-photos/regional/gabriella-cazare.attribution_required: Photo via University of Arizona College of Education faculty directory
/people-photos/regional/gabriella-cazare.notes: 650x650 PNG headshot from UA College of Education (uploaded Dec 2023). The recorder.pima.gov official photo is hard-blocked by Cloudflare bot challenge and returns 403; UA directory was the next-best official-adjacent source. Note: UA page spells her first name 'Gabriela' (one l) which appears to be a UA-side typo — canonical spelling is 'Gabriella'. Saved to regional/ since County Recorder is a countywide elected position.

/people-photos/pima-county/constance-har.subject: Constance L. Hargrove
/people-photos/pima-county/constance-har.notes: Could not find a CC-licensed or official .gov-hosted portrait. Tried: Wikimedia Commons (none), pima.gov/394/Elections (no portrait on the page; she's referenced in text only), pima.gov Newsroom contentId searches (no portrait found), Pima County Election Integrity Commission page (no portrait), Global Democracy Coalition profile page (no portrait), oldcms.pima.gov (403). News-outlet photos exist on KOLD, KGUN9, AZ Luminaria, Tucson.com, BizTUCSON, GVNews — all copyrighted/excluded per instructions. LinkedIn has a portrait but social-media-only and not CC-licensed. NEXT TRIES: (1) email pima.gov elections department to request an official portrait for editorial use, (2) screenshot from a public county-streamed board meeting (would need separate justification), (3) check Pima County Newsroom press release archives for the original February 2022 hire announcement which often carries an official photo. Time spent: ~6 search attempts plus 3 page fetches.

/people-photos/tucson/regina-romero.jpg.subject: Regina Romero
/people-photos/tucson/regina-romero.jpg.attribution_required: Photo by Gage Skidmore via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY-SA 2.0
/people-photos/tucson/regina-romero.jpg.notes: Excellent 4742x3161 photo of Mayor Romero, taken Oct 18, 2024 at an Obama campaign rally at the Cole and Jeannie Davis Sports Center in Tucson. Head-and-shoulders, recent, professional camera (Canon EOS 5D Mark IV).

/people-photos/tucson/lane-santa-cruz.jp.subject: Lane Santa Cruz
/people-photos/tucson/lane-santa-cruz.jp.license: Council Member's own Ward 1 site (fair-use editorial)
/people-photos/tucson/lane-santa-cruz.jp.attribution_required: Photo via Council Member Lane Santa Cruz's Ward 1 office site (tucward1.com)
/people-photos/tucson/lane-santa-cruz.jp.notes: 2500x1667 portrait from the official-adjacent Ward 1 office site. The tucsonaz.gov-hosted official portrait at ward1/images/lane-santa-cruz_1.jpg was not archived by Wayback (only the page wrapper was), and tucsonaz.gov hard-blocks bots via Akamai. The tucward1.com site is Lane's official Ward 1 office presence (not the campaign site), so equivalent provenance.

/people-photos/tucson/paul-cunningham.jp.subject: Paul Cunningham
/people-photos/tucson/paul-cunningham.jp.attribution_required: Photo via City of Tucson Ward 2 office (tucsonaz.gov)
/people-photos/tucson/paul-cunningham.jp.notes: 480x600 official Ward 2 portrait. Retrieved via Wayback Machine because tucsonaz.gov hard-blocks bots; the archived image at this Wayback timestamp is the actual JPEG bytes (verified). Canonical live path: tucsonaz.gov/files/sharedassets/public/v/1/government/ward2/images/cunningham-paul.jpg.

/people-photos/tucson/kevin-dahl.jpg.subject: Kevin Dahl
/people-photos/tucson/kevin-dahl.jpg.attribution_required: Photo via Council Member Kevin Dahl's campaign site (kevindahl4tucson.com)
/people-photos/tucson/kevin-dahl.jpg.notes: 2500x1667 portrait from Dahl's reelection campaign site (filename suggests a 2025 reelection-cycle photo). Used because tucsonaz.gov is hard-blocked and no Wayback snapshot of the actual JPEG was found for ward 3 images. High-resolution recent campaign portrait is editorial-safe for a sitting council member.

/people-photos/tucson/nikki-lee.jpg.subject: Nikki Lee
/people-photos/tucson/nikki-lee.jpg.attribution_required: Photo via City of Tucson Ward 4 office (tucsonaz.gov)
/people-photos/tucson/nikki-lee.jpg.notes: 480x636 official Ward 4 portrait. Retrieved via Wayback Machine because tucsonaz.gov hard-blocks bots; this timestamp served the actual JPEG. Canonical live path: tucsonaz.gov/files/sharedassets/public/v/1/government/ward4/images/nikki-lee.jpg.

/people-photos/tucson/selina-barajas.jpg.subject: Selina Barajas
/people-photos/tucson/selina-barajas.jpg.attribution_required: Photo via UCLA Luskin School of Public Affairs (luskin.ucla.edu)
/people-photos/tucson/selina-barajas.jpg.notes: 1707x2560 portrait from UCLA Luskin alumni feature published Nov 2025 about her Ward 5 election win. Barajas was newly sworn in Dec 2025; her tucsonaz.gov ward 5 official photo (city-council/images/ward-5-cm-barajas.jpg) exists on the live site but Wayback only archived the page wrapper, not the JPEG. The UCLA Luskin photo is her own alma mater's portrait of her — she's wearing a wide-brimmed hat outdoors, not a sterile head-and-shoulders headshot, but she's clearly identifiable and the framing is portrait-style. Tucson Spotlight news photos by Topacio Servellon are copyrighted and excluded. Quality note: not ideal for a sterile editorial avatar; consider replacing once tucsonaz.gov ward 5 image is retrievable.

/people-photos/tucson/miranda-schubert.j.subject: Miranda Schubert
/people-photos/tucson/miranda-schubert.j.attribution_required: Photo via Council Member Miranda Schubert's campaign site (mirandaforward6.com)
/people-photos/tucson/miranda-schubert.j.notes: 1632x1335 portrait from Schubert's campaign about page. Newly sworn in Dec 2025; tucsonaz.gov has an official portrait at city-council/images/council-member-miranda-schubert.jpeg but the JPEG was not archived by Wayback (only page wrapper). Campaign-site filename ('miranda-hsw.jpg') indicates this is her headshot.

/people-photos/tucson/timothy-thomure.jp.subject: Timothy Thomure
/people-photos/tucson/timothy-thomure.jp.license: Government work (fair-use editorial); commissioned portrait by Martha Lochert
/people-photos/tucson/timothy-thomure.jp.attribution_required: Photo via City of Tucson Office of the City Manager (tucsonaz.gov). Original portrait © Martha Lochert; the EXIF data on the city's published file states 'Non-exclusive use and reproduction rights granted to client by Martha Lochert' — i.e., the city has rights to distribute the image. For editorial republication on a news site, attribution to 'City of Tucson / Martha Lochert' is the safest framing.
/people-photos/tucson/timothy-thomure.jp.notes: Only 150x225 — small but the canonical official portrait. Retrieved via Wayback because tucsonaz.gov is hard-blocked. Canonical live path: tucsonaz.gov/files/sharedassets/public/v/2/government/city-manager-office/images/tthomure.jpg. The EXIF copyright statement is a flag for the downstream pipeline — needs Martha Lochert credited if displayed.

/people-photos/marana/jon-post.jpg.subject: Jon Post
/people-photos/marana/jon-post.jpg.attribution_required: Photo via Town of Marana, AZ (maranaaz.gov)
/people-photos/marana/jon-post.jpg.notes: Excellent 3870x5805 high-resolution official portrait, shot on a Panasonic DC-S5, edited in Adobe Lightroom Nov 27, 2024 — likely the official 2024 Marana council portraits session. Retrieved via Wayback because maranaaz.gov hard-blocks bots; the archived image is the actual JPEG bytes.

/people-photos/marana/roxanne-ziegler.jp.subject: Roxanne Ziegler
/people-photos/marana/roxanne-ziegler.jp.attribution_required: Photo via Town of Marana, AZ (maranaaz.gov)
/people-photos/marana/roxanne-ziegler.jp.notes: 3602x5403 official 2024 council portrait, same Panasonic DC-S5 / Lightroom session as Mayor Post and presumably the rest of the council. Vice Mayor as of Jan 7, 2025.

/people-photos/marana/terry-rozema.jpg.subject: Terry Rozema
/people-photos/marana/terry-rozema.jpg.attribution_required: Photo via Town of Marana Town Manager's Office (maranaaz.gov)
/people-photos/marana/terry-rozema.jpg.notes: 500x755 official portrait. Retrieved via Wayback Machine. Rozema has been Town Manager since Jan 2021.

/people-photos/orovalley/joseph-winfield.subject: Joseph C. Winfield
/people-photos/orovalley/joseph-winfield.attribution_required: Photo via Town of Oro Valley, AZ (orovalleyaz.gov)
/people-photos/orovalley/joseph-winfield.notes: 503x417 official mayor portrait. Filename on the live site is 'major-joe-winfield-headshot.jpg' (sic — typo for 'mayor'). Retrieved via Wayback because orovalleyaz.gov hard-blocks bots.

/people-photos/orovalley/melanie-barrett.subject: Melanie Barrett
/people-photos/orovalley/melanie-barrett.attribution_required: Photo via Town of Oro Valley, AZ Vice Mayor's page (orovalleyaz.gov)
/people-photos/orovalley/melanie-barrett.notes: Small 190x280 official Vice Mayor portrait. Retrieved via Wayback Machine. Resolution is on the low side — downstream pipeline may want to look for a higher-res replacement before using above thumbnail size.

/people-photos/orovalley/jeff-wilkins.pn.subject: Jeff Wilkins
/people-photos/orovalley/jeff-wilkins.pn.attribution_required: Photo via Town of Oro Valley, AZ Town Manager communications (orovalleyaz.gov)
/people-photos/orovalley/jeff-wilkins.pn.notes: 620x646 PNG official town manager portrait. Retrieved via Wayback Machine. Town Manager since June 2023.
